transcript.clean_text: Sunshine at last on level stage three after two days of rain the only worry wind well the umbrellas felt and indeed the t-shirts out in a happy atmosphere at the beginning of the day what would it draw well some uncategorized climbs right at the top of the day were always going to generate a breakaway and so it was we got one a fine one as well Surya our starting point an unto shot a distance of 158.5 kilometers but big climbs coming at the end of the day into Andorra really did Define the stage potentially some of the rest of the race as well the wind already suggesting itself at the beginning of the day and in fact blowing up into a minor tornado at the Finish Line thankfully the wind was to Abate before we got there 11 Riders real quality up front including Damiana Caruso Bahrain Victorious a lot of Destiny said well and Sepulveda Leonard kemna from Borah houns grower yeah the tour was there as well for total energies indeed once we crossed the border into Andorra the pace was being set by the pack behind but didn't seem too worried about closing the gap which at one point was around five minutes well points came points went away and we were pushing on towards what was to be the major test of the day the climbs two of them up to Andorra well the Breakaway started to break apart on the first of those two tests and in fact a small dish at the top of the mountain would give a fake descent really within that test before 10 kilometers all the way down to the final climb of the day Andrea Piccolo started the day in the red jersey was off the back early some big names were indeed to falter on the day others were starting to roll the dice from distance this Roman bardet deciding that he would strike out trying to get over the penultimate climb so giving himself a 10 kilometer descent and then nine kilometers to the Finish but it wasn't to be for him neither was it for Edward zeppard Vader who went over this Mountain's test in the lead of a trio up front including Caruso and kemna but unfortunately he was to get a puncture on The Descent leaving just kemna and Caruso out front invoking the chase behind them were sudar quickstep the pair could not decide who was going to take on the Lion's Share of the break and in the end it was to prove to be Lenny kemna who found himself out up front and all alone the Gap was starting to close and as the main names out front for the GC are thinking about potential for a stage when it meant that even Lenny kemner who now found himself The Last Man Standing from the Breakaway would be caught before the line the pace was high throughout the day and those in the front chasing group of the GC favorites were getting Lively I know Uso both he and Mark Salah were busy trying to soften up those who remained up front and it had a big impact on some big names including Garrett Thomas who was struggling sepkus ultimate Mountain domestic he pushed on allowing the likes of yonder's finger go on Primus roglich to rest up if rest could be found on a day like this folding over the top they went for it UE still very very busy no Panic behind utrago though in trouble Garrett Thomas also off the back entertainment Aaron Smith at this last moment was also suffering fatigue whenever Nepal went from a select group the only man who could chase him was he on his finger go last couple of Corners went the way of the amazing Belgium and in fact he was the man who was to raise his arms at the line after two days of complaints Joy at last however momentary unfortunately crashed into a journalist just beyond the line and indeed got himself a bloodied head as a result but a joy of Victory and taking the lead of this race counts for an awful lot at moments such as this while you take to the bumps and the bruises you are presented with in cycling but it's how you stand up afterwards that counts is there to be counted you can count on him as well he's defending Champion he's riding like one at the moment today was a brilliant statement by him given the same time as being a girl ayuzo ruglich Soler Mass Lenny Martinez Almeida blast off but more importantly he now leads this race by a margin of five seconds after what was a very impressive team time trial in appalling conditions on day one Mass nearest to him and Lenny Mountain as your top three Andrea vendram in the break took those crucial points along the way but this is about what remains and two rolling stages still to come it's gonna be an amazing race it already has been and our leader is Remco Avenue foreign
